pokemon:mr-mime.name: Mr Mime
pokemon:mr-mime.summary: Mr. Mime is a master of pantomime. Its gestures and motions convince watchers that something unseeable actually exists. Once the watchers are convinced, the unseeable thing exists as if it were real.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Mr. Mime is a master of pantomime. Its gestures and motions convince watchers that something unseeable actually exists. Once the watchers are convinced, the unseeable thing exists as if it were real.
It shapes an invisible wall in midair by minutely vibrating its fingertips to stop molecules in the air.
It shapes an invisible wall in midair by minutely vibrating its fingertips to stop molecules in the air.
If interrupted while it is miming, it will slap around the offender with its broad hands.
It uses the mysterious power it has in its fingers to solidify air into an invisible wall.
It is a pantomime expert that can create invisible but solid walls using miming gestures.
A MR. MIME is a master of pantomime. It can convince others that something unseeable actually exists. Once believed, the imaginary object does become real.
It is adept at conning people. It is said to be able to create walls out of thin air by miming.
A skilled mime from birth, it gains the ability to create invisi­ ble objects as it matures.
A skilled mime from birth, it gains the ability to create invisible objects as it matures.
If interrupted while it is miming, it will suddenly DOUBLESLAP the offender with its broad hands.
The behavior of this clown-like Pokémon reminds one of pantomime. It creates invisible walls using a force emitted from its fingertips.
Always practicing its pantomime act. It makes enemies believe something exists that really doesn’t.
Always practicing its pantomime act. It makes enemies believe something exists that really doesn’t.
Mr. Mime is a master of pantomime. Its gestures and motions convince watchers that something unseeable actually exists. Once the watchers are convinced, the unseeable thing exists as if it were real.
Emanations from its fingertips solidify the air into invisible walls that repel even harsh attacks.
It shapes an invisible wall in midair by minutely vibrating its fingertips to stop molecules in the air.
If interrupted while it is miming, it will slap around the offender with its broad hands.
MR. MIME is a master of pantomime. Its gestures and motions convince watchers that something unseeable actually exists. Once it is believed, it will exist as if it were a real thing.
MR. MIME is a master of pantomime. Its gestures and motions convince watchers that something unseeable actually exists. Once it is believed, it will exist as if it were a real thing.
It’s known for its top-notch pantomime skills. It protects itself from all sorts of attacks by emitting auras from its fingers to create walls.
Its fingertips emit a peculiar force field that hardens air to create an actual wall.
Its fingertips emit a peculiar force field that hardens air to create an actual wall.
The broadness of its hands may be no coincidence—many scientists believe its palms became enlarged specifically for pantomiming.
It creates invisible walls with its pantomiming. If you don’t act impressed, it will attack you with a double slap!
Its pantomime skills are wonderful. You may become enraptured while watching it, but next thing you know, Mr. Mime has made a real wall.
It shapes an invisible wall in midair by minutely vibrating its fingertips to stop molecules in the air.
It shapes an invisible wall in midair by minutely vibrating its fingertips to stop molecules in the air.
Emanations from its fingertips solidify the air into invisible walls that repel even harsh attacks.
It is adept at conning people. It is said to be able to create walls out of thin air by miming.
Always practices its pantomime act. It makes enemies believe something exists that really doesn't.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Mr. Mime is a master of pantomime. Its gestures and motions convince watchers that something unseeable actually exists. Once the watchers are convinced, the unseeable thing exists as if it were real.

pokemon:mr-rime.name: Mr Rime
pokemon:mr-rime.summary: Its amusing movements make it very popular. It releases its psychic power from the pattern on its belly.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Its amusing movements make it very popular. It releases its psychic power from the pattern on its belly.
It’s highly skilled at tap-dancing. It waves its cane of ice in time with its graceful movements.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Its amusing movements make it very popular. It releases its psychic power from the pattern on its belly.

pokemon:mime-jr.name: Mime Jr
pokemon:mime-jr.summary: It habitually mimics foes. Once mimicked, the foe cannot take its eyes off this Pokémon.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It habitually mimics foes. Once mimicked, the foe cannot take its eyes off this Pokémon.
It mimics the expressions and motions of those it sees to understand the feelings of others.
It mimics the expressions and motions of those it sees to understand the feelings of others.
It habitually mimics foes. Once mimicked, the foe cannot take its eyes off this Pokémon.
In an attempt to confuse its enemy, it mimics the enemy’s movements. Then it wastes no time in making itself scarce!
Known to turn up in bustling marketplaces now and again. It mimics people much as a child would, then watches how they react, eyes sparkling.
In an attempt to confuse its enemy, it mimics the enemy’s movements. Then it wastes no time in making itself scarce!
It likes places where people gather. It mimics foes to confuse them, then makes its getaway.
It mimics the expressions and motions of those it sees to understand the feelings of others.
It looks for a Mr. Rime that’s a good dancer and carefully copies the Mr. Rime’s steps like an apprentice.
In an attempt to confuse its enemy, it mimics the enemy’s movements. Then it wastes no time in making itself scarce!
It mimics everyone it sees, but it puts extra effort into copying the graceful dance steps of Mr. Rime as practice.
When this gifted mimic surprises an opponent, Mime Jr. feels so happy that it ends up forgetting it was imitating something.
It does its absolute best to mimic the movements and expressions of its opponents, but it’s still not very good at it.
It mimics the expressions and motions of those it sees to understand the feelings of others.
It mimics the expressions and motions of those it sees to understand the feelings of others.
In an attempt to confuse its enemy, it mimics the enemy’s movements. Then it wastes no time in making itself scarce!
It habitually mimics foes. Once mimicked, the foe cannot take its eyes off this Pokémon.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It habitually mimics foes. Once mimicked, the foe cannot take its eyes off this Pokémon.
